markdown:
# Woodcarver's Tools

- **Ability:** Dexterity
- **Utilize:** Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10)
- **Craft:** [[club]], [[greatclub]], [[quarterstaff]], Ranged weapons (except [[pistol]], [[musket]], and [[sling]]), Arcane Focus, [[arrows_20|Arrows]], [[bolts_20|Bolts]], Druidic Focus, [[ink_pen]], [[needles_50|Needles]]
